CommissionType.description: The type of commission earned. Possible values are: * ItemStandardPercentageCommission * ItemStandardFlatCommission * ItemPromotionalPercentageCommission * ItemPromotionalFlatCommission * StaffStandardPercentageCommission * StaffStandardFlatCommission * StaffPromotionalPercentageCommission * StaffPromotionalFlatCommission

CommissionEarnings.description: The portion of `Earnings` earned by this `CommissionType`.
